Petition For Order Compelling Trustee To Account For Trust Reserve And For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Rodriguez for (petitioner) San Francisco SPCA. Nancy Lofdahl (beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Rodriguez stated that there have been no objections to the accounting petition, that packets mailed to beneficiaries Vivon Chan, Danny Wo and Sammy Wo were returned in the mail, that they have no knowledge of their current addresses and that Mr. Crabtree had responded to a telephone message and thought he would be present today. Ms. Lofdahl stated that the conduct by Mr. Crabtree is troubling, that prior to this reserve he had admitted to substantial misconduct and misappropriation of funds, that he had appeared on January 26, 2015 (however the matter had been continued), Mr. Crabtree told her that there was $80,000.00 - $100,000.00 in the reserve, that he had made distribution to 1 of the beneficiaries and that he was trying to obtain counsel. Ms. Lofdahl reported that Mr. Crabtree has not responded to communication in the last year and requests that the court order Mr. Crabtree to submit a current bank statement showing the balance. Mr. Rodriguez has no objection to Ms. Lofdahl's request but stated that an accounting will be needed as well. The court stated that the trustee will be ordered to account and that a status will be set for April 20, 2015 with an ordert to appear being issued if the accounting is not on file by that date. The Court granted the petition for order compelling trustee to account for trust reserve and for final distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
